text:
and includes both uploaded data and manually entered data from the model data collection registry. All generated risk scores and baseline groups are contained in this file. The file is generated at the visit level, with one row for each visit for each beneficiary.

What does this file include? (variable highlights)
Model-Assigned Practice ID
Model-Assigned Patient ID
Visit Date
Baseline CVD Risk Score
CVD Risk Score at the time of the visit
Baseline risk group (low, medium, high)
A record
